segments.text: They're not getting knocked down, so back air won't connect. Spin Charge, purple throw - now when it gets like this, you don't know who's winning! Okay, Spin Charge Pikmin attached, it's an attack while peeling off those Pikmin. Side special is clear, but forward smash covers both sides!
segments.original_text: ダウンは当然しないので空中後ろも当たらないスピンチャージ紫投げさあこうなってくるとどっちが勝つかわからないぞさあスピンチャージピクミンを張り付けてそのピクミンを剥がしつつの攻撃である横必殺はわかっているしかし横スマッシュ反対から反対へ

full_text: They're not getting knocked down, so back air won't connect. Spin Charge, purple throw - now when it gets like this, you don't know who's winning! Okay, Spin Charge Pikmin attached, it's an attack while peeling off those Pikmin. Side special is clear, but forward smash covers both sides!
